controlNotes: The Signature 10 has a 3-band EQ on mono channels 1-8: High shelf (12kHz), Mid sweep (250Hz–5kHz), and Low shelf (80Hz). The HF and LF are simple shelving boost/cut knobs. The Mid band has both a frequency sweep knob and a gain knob. HPF is a dedicated button on each channel.

instructionTemplates.openEQ: Find the 3-band EQ section on CH {channel} (three stacked knobs: HF, Mid, LF)
instructionTemplates.enableHPF: Press the HPF button on CH {channel} to engage the 100Hz low-cut filter
instructionTemplates.setBandFrequency: Turn the {band} SWEEP knob to approximately {frequency}Hz
instructionTemplates.setBandGain: Turn the {band} knob {direction} to adjust by approximately {amount}dB
instructionTemplates.saveSettings: No save needed — analog settings are retained by knob position
